zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期温和上行趋势
zh.content:
以太坊当前价格为2297.76美元，较24小时内低点2268.99有所回升，显示出多头轻微占优的态势。价格稳居20日均线SMA(20)2239.78之上，表明短期趋势偏向上行，但波动幅度有限，需要关注突破或回调信号。  

MACD当前值为40.63，虽然缺少信号线参考，但正值仍暗示动能偏多。价格接近日内高点2299.99，显示上行动力可能受限，多头若无法有效突破该阻力，短线可能出现整理或轻微回调。缺失的RSI指标暂无法判断超买情况，需结合成交量观察市场热度。  

支撑位方面，下方2268-2270区域可作为关键防守线，若价格跌破此水平，短期空头可能获得机会。阻力位则位于2300附近，突破将有助于延续上升趋势，并可能触及2320-2330区域。短线交易者应关注价格在这些关键点位的反应，合理设置止损和止盈。  

综合来看，当前以太坊呈温和上行格局，建议观望为主，逢低可尝试小额多单布局，突破阻力则可适度加仓。注意控制风险，避免在震荡区间盲目追高，同时关注短期技术指标的更新，以调整交易策略。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum has recently shown modest bullish momentum, as indicated by the 1.10% increase in the last 24 hours, pushing the price to $2297.76. Despite the gains, the price remains relatively close to the recent high of $2299.99, which signals potential resistance in this region. A move above this level could set the stage for a retest of the next resistance zone around $2350, while failure to break past $2300 may cause price action to consolidate or retrace to lower levels.

Currently, there is limited information on the Relative Strength Index (RSI), making it difficult to gauge overbought or oversold conditions effectively. However, the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) is showing a value of 40.62522, which indicates a moderate bullish bias. The absence of a signal line makes interpretation more challenging, but the current MACD value suggests the market is not yet in an overstretched position. This could mean Ethereum has room for further upside, provided the momentum continues to strengthen.

Support for Ethereum is seen around $2268.99, just above the SMA(20) at $2239.78, with additional support near the $2200 region. If the price breaks below these levels, there could be a deeper pullback toward $2150 or even $2100. Traders should pay close attention to the support zones to assess risk and potential buying opportunities in the case of a pullback. A strong rebound from these levels would confirm a continuation of the bullish trend.

Given the current technical setup, traders might consider taking a long position above $2300, with targets at $2350 and $2400. Stop losses can be placed near $2200 or below the $2239.78 SMA(20) for risk management. If Ethereum fails to maintain momentum and retraces below key support, short positions might become viable, especially if the price confirms a bearish reversal.
